roles.name: repo-explorer
roles.summary: Maps the codebase, packet refs, and likely impact surface before execution.

roles.name: release-noter
roles.summary: Prepares review, ship, PR brief, and release communication artifacts.

roles.name: frontend-verifier
roles.summary: Validates UI surfaces, browser evidence, and frontend-specific regressions.

roles.name: docs-verifier
roles.summary: Checks command docs, getting-started flows, and closeout narratives.

prompts.name: reviewer
prompts.summary: Bias toward bugs, regressions, and missing tests before summaries.

prompts.name: implementer
prompts.summary: Bias toward delivering a concrete patch slice with verification.

prompts.name: release-noter
prompts.summary: Bias toward PR, release notes, and ship communication quality.
